headlines.title: Tech stocks today: Chip stocks pull back, Trump says he's meeting with AI executives
FedEx Corporation (FDX) Rose on Earnings Beat
Oppenheimer launches Wall Street's first coverage of SpaceX with bullish outlook
This AI Infrastructure Stock Is Up 650% This Year. Wall Street Still Sees More Upside.
Did SpaceX IPO Really Sink Bitcoin Price or Just Take the Blame?
McGraw Hill Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
Wall Street Giants, Sovereign Wealth Fund Back Canton Network Creator in $355M Round
Stocks Supported by a Rebound in Chipmakers and AI Stocks
Celularity receives Nasdaq notice for non-compliance with $35 million market value rule
Form 4 Microsoft Corporation For: 12 June
Crypto mutiny on Strategy: Shorts target 'MSTR' in bitcoin bloodbath
headlines.desc: Flows around Strategy (MSTR) and the company's variable-rate preferred stock STRC are turning bearish this week.

headlines.title: Watch: Three things to know about SpaceX's stock market debut
headlines.desc: The BBC's Samira Hussain explains everything you need to know about SpaceX's historic IPO.

headlines.title: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
headlines.desc: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq

headlines.title: Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal to overturn fraud convictions and prison
headlines.desc: If the former crypto billionaire loses all remaining avenues, he would be eligible for release in 2044.

headlines.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy, society
headlines.desc: Ukraine has increasingly targeted Russian refineries, depots and pipelines, as well as fuel supplies in Crimea.

headlines.title: Global oil prices end at 3-month low after Pakistan says a U.S.-Iran peace deal has been reached
headlines.desc: Brent crude on Friday settled at its lowest level since the early days of the U.S.-Iran conflict. after Pakistan said a peace deal between the nations had been reached.

headlines.title: There’s a 68% chance the stock market ends the year higher. Why the headlines shouldn’t disrupt your portfolio.
headlines.desc: Blocking out the daily noise gives you a clear edge over short-term chaos.

headlines.title: Is it too late to buy SpaceX’s stock? Here’s how Tesla’s did after one day — and five years.
headlines.desc: Also in Weekend Reads: A bitcoin-pricing model that looks way ahead, the bear market for gold and retirement-planning advice.

headlines.title: Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says
headlines.desc: The deal which will pave the way for hostilities to end is close to being finalised, the US, Iran and mediators Pakistan say.

headlines.title: How Elon Musk nailed the SpaceX IPO: ‘I’m not sure that this could have gone much better’
headlines.desc: There were a lot of ways that SpaceX’s initial public offering could have gone wrong. Instead, the company bucked Wall Street norms, pulled off the biggest IPO ever and raised $75 billion.

headlines.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
headlines.desc: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

headlines.title: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
headlines.desc: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.

headlines.title: Chip rebound sparks hedging flurry from traders
headlines.desc: Despite the overall bearish sentiment on the cohort, traders put a few bullish bets on potential semiconductor winners.

headlines.title: The Fed will have to raise interest rates in July to appease 'bond vigilantes,' Yardeni says
headlines.desc: Sent to the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, incoming Chair Kevin Warsh instead may have to push for higher levels.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts recommend these 3 dividend stocks for solid returns
headlines.desc: Investors seeking steady income can bolster their portfolios by adding dividend stocks with attractive yields.

headlines.title: SpaceX IPO hype has traders flocking to this mid-cap stock
headlines.desc: Options volume is picking up in Nasdaq-listed Echostar, a $35-billion networking business based in Colorado that owns an estimated 3% of SpaceX stock.

headlines.title: Investors can 'buy' SpaceX early with Coinbase perpetual futures on pre-IPOs
headlines.desc: Pre-IPO perps give traders the ability to speculate on the value of a private company without owning shares.

headlines.title: Confirmed screwworm case in Texas sends two biotech stocks higher
headlines.desc: Options volume is surging for Zoetis as traders look for potential stock market winners in light of a screwworm case in Texas.

headlines.title: Wholesale prices rose 1.1% in May, more than expected, on surge in energy
headlines.desc: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.7% in May, according to the Dow Jones consensus forecast.

headlines.title: Avalanche Treasury Co set to start trading on Nasdaq as crypto proxy trade evolves
headlines.desc: Avalanche is a six-year-old blockchain built for business that counts BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and Apollo among its users.
